metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🔐 Identity-to-Network Kill Chain
---
Reconstructs the full access chain: NAC/RADIUS authentication → Windows logon → server access. Correlates Cisco ISE authentication events with SecurityEvent Windows logons and Syslog Unix activity from the same account and IP. A failed ISE auth followed by a successful Windows logon from a different IP is a credential relay attack."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔑 NAC / RADIUS Authentication (Cisco ISE)"},"name":"ise-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == 'Cisco' and DeviceProduct has 'ISE'
| summarize
    TotalAuths = count(),
    PassedAuths = countif(DeviceAction has_any ('Passed', 'Pass', 'success', 'Success', 'allowed')),
    FailedAuths = countif(DeviceAction has_any ('Failed', 'Fail', 'failure', 'Failure', 'denied', 'reject'))
| project TotalAuths, PassedAuths, FailedAuths","size":4,"title":"ISE authentication summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalAuths","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-ise"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == 'Cisco' and DeviceProduct has 'ISE'
| where DeviceAction has_any ('Failed', 'Fail', 'failure', 'Failure', 'denied', 'reject')
| summarize FailCount = count() by SourceUserName, SourceIP
| where FailCount > 5
| sort by FailCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"ISE authentication failures — accounts with >5 failures","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FailCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-ise-failures"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == 'Cisco' and DeviceProduct has 'ISE'
| summarize AuthCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), DeviceAction
| sort by TimeGenerated asc","size":3,"title":"ISE auth events over time","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"linechart"},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-ise-trend"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔗 Kill Chain: ISE Failed → Windows Logon Success (Credential Relay)"},"name":"relay-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let ISEFailures = CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == 'Cisco' and DeviceProduct has 'ISE'
| where DeviceAction has_any ('Failed', 'Fail', 'failure', 'Failure', 'denied', 'reject')
| where isnotempty(SourceUserName)
| summarize ISEFailCount = count(), ISEIPs = make_set(SourceIP, 5), LastISEFail = max(TimeGenerated)
    by AccountName = tolower(SourceUserName);
let WinLogons = SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType in (3, 10)
| where isnotempty(TargetUserName)
| where TargetUserName !has '$'
| summarize WinLogonCount = count(), WinIPs = make_set(IpAddress, 5), LastWinLogon = max(TimeGenerated)
    by AccountName = tolower(TargetUserName);
ISEFailures
| join kind=inner WinLogons on AccountName
| project AccountName, ISEFailCount, LastISEFail, ISEIPs, WinLogonCount, LastWinLogon, WinIPs
| sort by ISEFailCount desc","size":0,"title":"Accounts with ISE failures AND Windows network logon successes — potential credential relay","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ISEFailCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":50}},{"columnMatch":"LastISEFail","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"LastWinLogon","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-relay-candidates"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🖥️ Windows → Unix Server Pivot Chain"},"name":"pivot-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let WinAdmins = SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType in (3, 10)
| where isnotempty(TargetUserName) and TargetUserName !has '$'
| where isnotempty(IpAddress) and IpAddress != '-' and IpAddress != '127.0.0.1'
| summarize WinLogons = count() by AccountName = tolower(TargetUserName), SourceIP = IpAddress;
let UnixRoot = Syslog
| where Facility == 'authpriv'
| where SyslogMessage has_any ('sudo', 'su:', 'root', 'session opened for user root')
| where isnotempty(HostIP)
| summarize UnixEvents = count() by HostIP;
WinAdmins
| join kind=inner (UnixRoot | project SourceIP = HostIP, UnixEvents) on SourceIP
| project AccountName, SourceIP, WinLogons, UnixEvents
| sort by UnixEvents desc","size":0,"title":"IPs that logged into Windows AND performed privileged Unix activity — lateral pivot","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"WinLogons","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue","max":100}},{"columnMatch":"UnixEvents","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":50}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-win-unix-pivot"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| summarize FailCount = count() by TargetUserName, IpAddress
| where FailCount > 10
| sort by FailCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Windows logon failures >10 — brute force candidates","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FailCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":200}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-win-failures"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Syslog
| where Facility == 'authpriv'
| where SyslogMessage has_any ('authentication failure', 'Failed password', 'Invalid user', 'FAILED LOGIN')
| summarize SshFailCount = count() by HostName, HostIP
| sort by SshFailCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Unix/Linux SSH & auth failures by host","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"SshFailCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":200}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-unix-failures"}],"styleSettings":{},"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
